elpage.authRequired: authorization via SPbGUT personal account is required to vote
elpage.noChange: your vote cannot be changed after confirmation
elpage.voteRecorded: your vote has been recorded and cannot be changed
elpage.canVoteAt: you will be able to vote on
elpage.resultsDesc: voting results will be displayed here: vote percentage, winner, turnout. Uses ResultChart component.

ballot.instruction: select one candidate and confirm your choice
ballot.disclaimer: your vote cannot be changed after confirmation

vote.willBeRecorded: your vote will be recorded and cannot be changed

auth.title:
to participate in elections
log in to your account
auth.sub: authorization via SPbGUT account — only university students can vote

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: (frequently asked questions)
faq.fallback: if you haven't found the answer, feel free to contact us via
faq.q1: I encountered a problem, who should I contact?
faq.a1: if you encounter any issues, feel free to reach out via telegram or vkontakte
faq.a2: voting statistics will be available after the elections are completed on this page in the archived elections section.
faq.q3: how can I make sure my vote was counted?
faq.a3: after voting you will receive a confirmation on screen. every vote is recorded in the system and cannot be changed.
faq.a4: no, each student can cast only one vote. the system automatically verifies vote uniqueness.

archive.title: ARCHIVE
archive.hint: click on the card to go to the next one

notFound.title: page not found
notFound.sub: elections with this ID do not exist or have been removed
